alerts.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
alerts.description: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

alerts.title: This startup is betting tokenmaxxing will create the next compute giant
alerts.description: Parasail raised $32 million in a Series A, signaling a fractured future of models and compute.

alerts.title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
alerts.description: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.

alerts.title: South Korean AI Chipmaker Raises $400M for Inference
alerts.description: The evolving AI market presents opportunities for new players, such as Rebellions, to offer silicon diversity.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Traza raises $2.1 million led by Base10 to automate procurement workflows with AI
alerts.description: For decades, procurement has been the back office that enterprise software forgot.
